message:
Add GitHub Copilot CLI agent detection

New CopilotCli variant in the Agent enum with full detection support:
environment variable detection (COPILOT_CLI=1, COPILOT_AGENT_START_TIME_SEC),
parent process name detection (contains "copilot"), config key mapping
("copilot-cli"), display name ("GitHub Copilot CLI"), and name parsing
("copilot", "copilotcli", "copilot-cli" all resolve correctly).

Copilot CLI is marked as a known trusted agent, receiving the same
trust level as other recognized coding agents for safe command execution
while maintaining strict controls for destructive operations.

- src/agent.rs: CopilotCli enum variant, environment + process detection,
  config_key/display/from_name implementations, 2 unit tests for env
  detection, test cleanup additions for env var removal
- tests/agent_profile_comprehensive.rs: integration test env mapping,
  2 E2E tests (COPILOT_CLI, COPILOT_AGENT_START_TIME_SEC), trust level
  test entries for destructive + safe command verification
- docs/agents.md: detection table entry for Copilot CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ trust to well-behaved agents while maintaining strict controls for unknown ones.
 | Continue | Environment | `CONTINUE_SESSION_ID` |
 | Codex CLI | Environment | `CODEX_CLI=1` |
 | Gemini CLI | Environment | `GEMINI_CLI=1` |
+| GitHub Copilot CLI | Environment | `COPILOT_CLI=1` or `COPILOT_AGENT_START_TIME_SEC` |
 
 ## Detection Priority
